scripts.start: node -e "console.log('Sanitized public export: use simulation scripts only; live trading disabled.');"
scripts.dev: node -e "console.log('Sanitized public export: use simulation scripts only; live trading disabled.');"
scripts.predict-trade:A: cross-env TRADING_MODE=simulation PREDICTION_SUFFIX=_A LOGS_DIR=logs_eth PROB_THRESHOLD=0.92 RISK_CONTROL_ENABLED=false ALLOWED_MARKETS=ETH ts-node src/prediction_index.ts
